title: Dressrosa’s Hidden System Emerges
description: Pages 17–20 focus on dressrosa’s hidden system emerges, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Cavendish, Colosseum Fighters, Doflamingo, Fujitora, Marines, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12 as sanji becomes entangled with Violet while Law’s Green Bit exchange collapses into a trap involving Doflamingo and Fujitora.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: So we've been taken in, hook, line, and sinker....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: The world government!? He's gone beyond the scope of the authority yielded even by the shi- Chibukai

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: I... I'm too scared of him to run, myself....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: But you might be able to make it in time!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: So hurry up and contact your people !!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Present Time: Green Bit

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Buzz Buzz

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: What're you saying!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Buzz

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Buzz

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Just what do you mean... Saka-san...

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: Even Marine Head- Quarters was misinformed ...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Yeah, it's a real pain. I'm heading to mariejois now

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: to question the gorosei... sorry, this is just how it is....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I heard the Conver- sation just now! That was Sanji, right!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Nico- ya!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Uohhhh!! Half a woman popped out!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: O!!! Where are nose-ya and your real body!? If what we just heard is true, our negotiations are about to break down

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Whaddya mean break down? What about the plan to hand me over!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Nico-ya! Alert nose-ya!! We've got to escape from this island quickly!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Well... we're underground right now!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Under- Ground !?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: We've found ourselves in a bit of trouble... but we're both safe

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: We can't back you up, but if you need to escape, go ahead and do so

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: We'll head for the designated harbor after- wards

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Okay then. Understand...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Best of luck in Battle!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: SAME TO YOU!

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: Joker!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: 3 PM

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Fuffliff! Fuffu...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: Gahhhh!! M ...Marines!! But wait ... maybe that's alright!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: Well done, really, I mean it!!

dialogue.speaker: Fujitora
dialogue.text: and can you believe it! Even a marine Admiral has shown up...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: OI, LAW!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Government members

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Having quit the shichi- bukai, I can't help but be a little scared !!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: LiAR!!

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: At the same time: Dressrosa's Corrida Colosseum

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: Strawhat! When did you slip into the ring!?

dialogue.speaker: Cavendish
dialogue.text: Stop TressPassing, Cavendish!!

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: It's the 139 fighters of C-block!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: battle Royale!! Who's gonna win!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: And there's the starting bell!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: I've been waiting for this!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: Let's do it!!
